programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Local Motion: Montana Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steve must deal with bad weather and fierce competition during a late-season central Montana elk hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren give comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen their first taste.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren hunt with Joe Rogan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Spring Break: Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend and wild turkey specialist, Robert Abernathy, head to southern Florida to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Boone and Bugles: Kentucky Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is invited by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation for a special opportunity to hunt elk during the rut in the mountainous coal country of southeastern Kentucky, a place where his hero Daniel Boone once roamed. This is Steve's first eastern elk hunt, and he quickly realizes that the rules of the game here are different. If he manages to track one down, he'll prepare what was supposedly Boone's favorite meal: elk liver.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cold Water: Alaskan Seafood Cooking Special
programme.desc: Join Steve on this Cooking Special as he dives into the best of Alaskan seafood, featuring shrimp, crab, fish, and clams. Learn how to make easy, delicious seafood recipes that showcase the fresh flavors of the sea. Whether you're a seasoned cook or a beginner, Steve's simple steps will help you prepare mouthwatering dishes that capture the essence of Alaskan waters.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Buck Dreams: Colorado Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steve's annual quest for a giant mule deer buck continues this year in southwest Colorado. Here, Steve fills us in on his favorite critter, the mule deer. As he hunts will share his vast knowledge about these special western game animals including how to hunt, butcher, and most importantly how cook them-if he can put his tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater - Surf N Turk: Wisconsin Turkey and Carp
programme.desc: Steven Rinella scratches his spring turkey itch this year as he visits Southeast Wisconsin to call in some big eastern Toms with his buddy Jerod Fink. The guys also plan to do some bow fishing after dark so they can enjoy a real Midwest turkey and fish fry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Best Start - Wild Game Breakfast Cooking Special
programme.desc: Breakfast is the most important meal of the day, but is often overlooked by wild game cooks at home. Following a series of successful hunts across North America this past fall, Steve demonstrates how to cook a variety of breakfast classics using wild game ingredients‚Äîincluding black bear bacon, which Steve has never tried before.

programme.title: MeatEater - Gila Monster: New Mexico Bull Elk
programme.desc: After four years of waiting, Steven Rinella draws a coveted, limited-entry public land bull elk tag for New Mexico's Gila National Forest. Steve heads into the backcountry on a solo backpack hunt where his biggest challenge is the vast expanse of hills covered in thick timber. This demanding hunt requires lots of glassing and even more hiking. Here, even just one missed opportunity could result in an empty freezer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hearts of Darkness: Ticker Cooking Special
programme.desc: While its considered a long-standing hunting tradition to eat the heart of your first kill, the heart.

programme.title: Tortellini and Balsamic Vinegar
programme.desc: The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to the most well-known ingredients in Italian cuisine. Nadia travels into the heart of Bologna to learn how to make Tortellini and then to Modena to learn the process of making Balsamic Vinegar with Michelin Star Chef Massimo Bottura. Using a few potatoes and some modified poultry, Nadia highlights how this region is the capital of food and a force of nature!

programme.title: Zucchini Blossoms and Ricotta
programme.desc: While exploring Lazio, Nadia shares a Roman summer classic, Stuffed Zucchini Blossoms, in preparation for a summer dinner party. For the main course, Nadia concocts one of her specialties, Lemon Peel Ricotta Pesto. And what party would be complete without a refreshing cocktail? Make no mistake, this Negroni Sbagliato is simply stunning!

programme.title: Once Upon an Italian Sunday
programme.desc: In this special episode, Nadia Caterina Munno “The Pasta Queen'' explores the region of Lazio and makes some traditional Sunday Supper dishes. Follow along as she whips up a decadent Fettuccine Alfredo, Sautéed Dandelion Greens, and Roasted Chicken with Potatoes and Sautéed Mushrooms. Along the way Nadia visits Il Vero Alfredo, harvests dandelion greens, and forages wild mushrooms.

programme.title: Orecchiette and Mussels
programme.desc: The Pasta Queen, Nadia Caterina Munno, starts her culinary tour of Italy in the region of Puglia. Come along as she makes two classic Pugliese dishes: Orecchiette con Pomodoro e Cacioricotta and Cozze alla Tarantina. Alongside these two recipes, she dives further into two key ingredients for the recipes with Bari’s Pasta Ladies and Taranto’s mussel fishermen.

programme.title: Sostengo el Pi
programme.desc: María de todos los Ángeles, ve atentamente un programa de televisión en el que el maestro de yoga da tres consejos básicos del feng shui para atraer la fortuna y el amor, esto provoca que María inmediatamente se ponga a mover muebles y a tirar cosas, al ver esto Carmelito pone el grito en el cielo, hasta que su nieta lo convence de que con esto sencillos cambios podrán atraer la fortuna y el dinero. Delfino y Betsabé llegan a casa de Doña Lucha a cobrar el dinero de una tanda que les debe de tiempo atrás, ésta que también ha visto el programa, y no tiene para pagarles, usa los argumentos de maestro Chuy y los convence de que se inscriban en un curso de feng shui que va a impartir, con lo cual aprovecha para ponerlos a mover los muebles de su casa, hasta que ya cansados deciden abandonar el curso. Como segundo paso Doña Lucha decide escombrar la casa y comienza a tirar cosas de Rosa Aurora, Albertano y del Chino, pero el mono de coco que ella trajo de Acapulco lo vuelve a colocar en el mismo lugar. La euforia por limpiar lleva a las dos familias hasta la azotea en la que se desata un conflicto por el espacio y por el respeto a sus pertenencias.

programme.title: Ofertín y los vinagres balsámicos
programme.desc: Albertano sale a la calle a buscar trabajo para que El Chino pueda ir a una excursión a los prismas basalticos, María se encuentra abatida ya que su abuelo quiere desaparecer la botarga de Ofertín quien baila junto a ella mientras anuncia sus ofertas, pues nadie se quiere meter dentro de esta, Albertano se ofrece gustoso y María le paga una semana por adelantado, con este dinero El Chino podría ir a su excursión. A la mañana siguiente, Albertano descubre que Doña Lucha ha tirado a la basura la botarga de Ofertín por error. Don Carmelo amenaza con demandarlos pero Rosa Aurora decide tomar el lugar del peluche y baila seductoramente lo que causa revuelo en la colonia e incrementa las ganancias de la tienda.

programme.title: Cumplemes
programme.desc: Vanesa olvida el cumplememes de Fabián y sus amigos le ayudan a preparar una sorpresa. Un alumno de Silvia le confiesa que está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Tu nueva mamá
programme.desc: El padre de Lorena regresa con la noticia de que se casó con su enfermera. El Borre y Virginia sacan su app para vender tacos.

programme.title: A lo chino
programme.desc: Los López Pérez tienen un adeudo de agua y Luis les decomisa su televisión. Germán se enamora de Meche, la nueva nana de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: ¿Dónde está Rambo?
programme.desc: Pedro ha extraviado a Rambo y se deprime. La suegra de Alejandra quiere llevar a los López Pérez de vacaciones.

programme.title: Mollejitas 'Mi flaquita'
programme.desc: Arturo tiene la idea de poner un puesto callejero de comida. Pedro y Cris aplican técnicas de feng shui en el departamento para las buenas energías.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La ex de Rocko
programme.desc: Rocko tiene contacto con una exnovia y Alejandra se pone celosa. Los Rivers llevan a Luisito Jr. a algunos cástines.

programme.title: Tomasa
programme.desc: Luis compra un dispositivo inteligente para controlar el departamento y lo presume con los Vecinos. Los López Pérez rifan un extraño cuadro.

programme.title: La cruda
programme.desc: Rocko y Alejandra bebieron demasiado la noche anterior y no recuerdan nada de lo que pasó, Rocko fue arrestado por el robo de artículos para bebes y Luisito Jr. dio sus primeros pasos impresionando a sus padres de la nueva etapa que comienza.

programme.title: Prueba de embarazo
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que está embarazada, ¿cómo lo tomará la familia? Chris y su pareja han decidido adoptar a un bebé.

programme.title: Melena de Luis
programme.desc: Luis debe recurrir a remedios extremos para poder continuar con su labor de venta. Rocco está dispuesto a fugarse de la prisión.

programme.title: Foto familiar
programme.desc: El abuelo de Benito llega al edificio para tomarse la foto familiar. Germán encuentra a un equipo de niños con quien hacer la reta de fútbol.

programme.title: Abarrotes Don Arturo
programme.desc: Morris tiene la tarea de vender unos chocolates de la escuela y a su familia se les ocurre una idea. Lorena manda a arreglar la máquina de escribir de Frankie.

programme.title: Tapa calefactora
programme.desc: Germán intentará instalar una nueva tapa calefactora en el inodoro de don Hipólito. Mientras que, Vanessa probará un remedio contra las canas.

programme.title: Regalo perfecto
programme.desc: Luisito le da un regalo a Silvita por su cumpleanos, pero ella no lo esperaba. En tanto que, Calaco decide visitar a Rocco en su casa.

programme.title: Tendedero
programme.desc: Magdalena decides to put a clothesline in the middle of the corridors of the building and Luis will look for a way to remove it.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: Silvia agrega a Luis al chat de la guardería y Germán recibe la visita de sus amigos comentaristas de TUDN que transmiten un partido desde la conserjería.

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.
